title: Dormant Sigil
description: Adds an item that has the ability to revive your friends in Hardcore Multiplayer.
body:
# Dormant Sigil
**Dormant Sigil** is a lightweight add-on that introduces a revival mechanic for Hardcore multiplayer worlds. Using a special item: the **Dormant Sigil**, players can resurrect fallen allies and bring them back from permanent death.

## Features
- Adds a custom item, the **Dormant Sigil**, which;
- Revives other dead players in Hardcore mode
- Has a fair recipe which introduces new uses to existing vanilla items
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b89b8ee57c789ef5e1e934d55b3f2ff2cdb753b0.png)

## Ideal For
- Hardcore SMPs that want a touch of forgiveness
- Servers where permadeath feels a little too permanent

## Installation
- Data Pack
  - Drop the datapack in your world’s `datapacks` folder
- Fabric / Quilt / Forge / NeoForge
  - Drop the .jar file in the `%appdata%/.minecraft/mods` folder

## Not Compatible With
- Datapacks or modifications that unlock recipes in any way
